title: Field Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: B2B Field Marketing or Demand Generation (3-5 years)
matched_skills: B2B marketing background (GTM, campaigns, sales enablement)
Analytical thinking and KPI/ROI reporting (Power BI, Looker Studio)
missing_skills: Marketing automation tools (HubSpot, Marketo or equivalent)
Field marketing / demand generation focus (vs. product marketing)
SaaS or Legal Tech industry background
core_responsibilities: Own regional field marketing strategy and campaigns for Germany
Generate and qualify leads with focus on pipeline growth
Collaborate closely with sales to support Legisway Suite portfolio growth
Create content for local campaigns and manage external vendors
Track performance and report to sales and management
recommended_emphasis: Highlight B2B campaign execution and lead generation outcomes from previous roles
Emphasize data-driven reporting (KPI dashboards, ROI) and analytical approach
Showcase cross-functional collaboration with sales teams
Mention any event, webinar, or trade fair execution experience
Stress German language proficiency and EMEA market exposure
summary: The candidate has a solid B2B marketing background with strong GTM, sales enablement, and analytics skills, but the core discipline mismatch (product marketing vs. field/demand-gen marketing) is significant. Critical tool gaps — no HubSpot/Marketo or Salesforce experience — are listed as required by the JD. German at B1+ meets minimum threshold but is a mild risk for a Germany-focused regional role.
risk_flags: Discipline mismatch: candidate is a Product Marketing Manager; role requires Field Marketing / Demand Generation specialist
Missing required martech stack: no HubSpot, Marketo, or Salesforce in CV
German B1+ may be insufficient for a Germany-only regional marketing role requiring strong local communication
